name: @trackx/parser
description: OpenAI-backed parser service for TrackX finance messages.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @trackx/config build && pnpm --filter @trackx/shared build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @trackx/config build && pnpm --filter @trackx/shared build && vitest run
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @trackx/config build && pnpm --filter @trackx/shared build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
